content.text: The dashboard is started with `--include-dashboard=false` and binds to `127.0.0.1`. The Service fix alone isn't enough — I need to make Ray serve the dashboard on `0.0.0.0`. Let me check the deployment.

input.command: kubectl -n ray get deploy -o name; echo "---"; kubectl -n ray get deploy ray-head -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].command}' 2>/dev/null; echo; echo "=== args ==="; kubectl -n ray get deploy ray-head -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].args}'

kubectl -n ray patch deploy ray-head --type=json -p '[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/command","value":["sh","-c","ray start --head --node-ip-address=\"${MY_POD_IP}\" --port=6379 --include-dashboard=true --dashboard-host=0.0.0.0 --dashboard-port=8265 --num-cpus=0 --block\n"]}]'
echo "--- adding containerPort ---"
kubectl -n ray patch deploy ray-head --type=json -p '[{"op":"add","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/ports/-","value":{"name":"dashboard","containerPort":8265,"protocol":"TCP"}}]'
input.description: Enable dashboard on 0.0.0.0 and add container port
